label.text: {# localization('agfNextBloodMoon')}: [{daycolor}]{# max(0, gamestat('BloodMoonDay') - day) == 0 ? localization('agfBloodMoonTonight') : max(0, gamestat('BloodMoonDay') - day)}[-]
{# localization('agfNextBloodMoon')}: [{daycolor}]{# max(0, gamestat('BloodMoonDay') - day) == 0 ? localization('agfBloodMoonTonight') : max(0, gamestat('BloodMoonDay') - day)}[-]
